title: 10 best herbal creams for congestive heart failure
description: Zingiber officinale, also known as ginger, creams helps with congestive heart failure because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The active compounds in ginger, such as gingerols and shogaols, have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular function. By reducing inflammation in the blood vessels and improving blood flow, ginger creams may help alleviate symptoms of congestive heart failure, such as shortness of breath and fatigue.
